title: Hiring Category Manager at Urban Ladder

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Urban Ladder
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!
